name: Delivery Note Report
query:
SELECT
DN.name as "DELIVERY NOTE NO:Link/Delivery Note:120",
DN.posting_date as "DELIVERY NOTE DATE:Date:70",
DN.customer as "CUSTOMER:Link/Customer:120",
DN.customer_name as "CUSTOMER NAME",
DN.purpose as "PURPOSE",
DNO.item_code as "ITEM CODE:Link/Item:120",
DNO.description as "DESCRIPTION",
  (select c.sales_person from `tabCustomer` c where c.name = DN.customer) as "SALES PERSON:Link/Sales Person",
SUM(IFNULL(DNO.qty, 0)) AS "DELIVERY NOTE QTY:Float:100",
DN.status as "DELIVERY NOTE STATUS",
(select SO.name from `tabSales Order` as SO   where  SO.customer= DN.customer and SO.delivery_note=DN.name and SO.docstatus=1 LIMIT 1 )as "SALES ORDER NO:Link/Sales Order:120",
(select SO.transaction_date from `tabSales Order` as SO where  SO.customer= DN.customer and SO.delivery_note=DN.name and SO.docstatus=1 LIMIT 1) as "SALES ORDER DATE:Date:70",
(select ifnull(sum(SOI.qty),0)  from  `tabSales Order` as SO 
inner join `tabSales Order Item` as SOI on SO.name = SOI.parent 
Where SOI.item_code = DNO.item_code and SO.customer= DN.customer and SO.delivery_note=DN.name and SO.docstatus=1 LIMIT 1) as "SALES ORDER QTY:Float:100",
(select GROUP_CONCAT(SI.name) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI where DN.name = SI.delivery_note and SI.docstatus=1 LIMIT 1) as "INVOICE NO:Link/Sales Invoice:120",
(select GROUP_CONCAT(SI.posting_date) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI where DN.name = SI.delivery_note and SI.docstatus=1 LIMIT 1 )as "INVOICE DATE",
(select  ifnull(sum(SII.qty),0) from  `tabSales Invoice` as SI
  inner join `tabSales Invoice Item` as SII on SI.name = SII.parent
  where  SII.item_code= DNO.item_code and SI.customer= DN.customer and SI.delivery_note=DN.name and SI.docstatus=1 LIMIT 1 )as "INVOICE QTY",
 
CASE 
     WHEN DN.status='Cancelled' THEN 0
     WHEN DN.status='Return Issued' THEN 0 
     WHEN DN.return_against ='' THEN 0 ELSE(select (select SUM(IFNULL(DNO.qty, 0))
    ) - (select ifnull(sum(SII.qty),0) from `tabSales Invoice` as SI  
inner join `tabSales Invoice Item` as SII on SI.name = SII.parent
where  SII.item_code= DNO.item_code and SI.customer= DN.customer and SI.delivery_note=DN.name and SI.docstatus=1 and DN.docstatus=1 LIMIT 1 )) END as "PENDING QTY:Data:100"

FROM
  `tabDelivery Note` DN
  inner join  `tabDelivery Note Item` as DNO on DN.name = DNO.parent
 inner join  `tabSales Team` as DSO on DN.name = DSO.parent
 
 Where DN.docstatus=1 and (DATE(DN.`posting_date`) between %(From Date)s and %(To Date)s) and DSO.sales_person=%(Sales Person)s
 GROUP BY
  DN.name, DNO.item_code
ORDER BY
  DN.name
